meta.title: The craziest stories we didn't get to tell in 2023! Featuring F-35, Apache, and SR-71 pilots!
meta.description:
2023 has been an incredible year — so let's close out with some of the coolest stories we heard during out interviews that didn't make it into previous episodes of AirPower! 

Make sure to check out Don Bentley's book, "Weapons Grade," here:
https://donbentleybooks.com/books/tom-clancy-weapons-grade/

Follow Hasard Lee on YouTube here:
https://www.youtube.com/@HasardLee

And thank you from the bottom of our hearts for all the support this year!

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
